dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Theophylline (anhydrous) extended-release tablets 400 mg or 600 mg can be taken once a day in the morning or evening. It is recommended that theophylline (anhydrous) extended-release tablets be taken with meals. Patients should be advised that if they choose to take theophylline (anhydrous) extended-release tablets with food it should be taken consistently with food and if they take it in a fasted condition it should routinely be taken fasted.
